notion.comment: If populated, render_deliverable can publish a Notion mirror of the PDF

data_quirks.notes: ad_spend_is_net_of_credits MUST be true before sharing — map spend to the NET ad column, never gross. Platforms credit back a large share of ad spend; a gross figure doubles spend and halves ROAS. The engine flags any location >60% marketing as a likely un-netted-gross error.

ads._comment: Map spend to the NET-of-credits column (e.g. 'Net Ad Spend'), NEVER a gross 'Total Ad Spend'. If only a gross column exists, net the Ad Credits column yourself before building.

_notes: column_mappings is the column rename map for each platform's source CSV.
Fill in once per client, then reuse across audit cycles.
If a column is missing in the source CSV, omit it from the mapping — the script tolerates absence.
